title: AnvilCraft: GuideME
body:
* 为铁砧工艺添加GuideME的支持
  * 在安装 GuideME 与本模组时，可以通过铁砧工艺的指南书打开本模组提供的指南手册
* Add GuideME support to AnvilCraft
  * When installing GuideME and this mod, you can open the guidebook provided by this mod through the guidebook of the AnvilCraft.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/adnRbz14/images/1af15394e3bba1212439ea0ef7242fcd4ebf8b08.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/adnRbz14/images/912b5cab914703ea7b9b8a8ad1e1e66912e3ddbb.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/adnRbz14/images/d4addf2ee9c99afc55e14f0f2b43ef693bc442a7.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/adnRbz14/images/e99dbeedae90348cd4226a9ca13265024a42ed06.png)
